playwright.description: Real browser automation — navigate to localhost, click, screenshot emoji output at any viewport

fetch.description: Fetch web content — pull color algorithm docs, Twemoji release notes, external references during dev

memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph across sessions — stores algorithm decisions, tuning results, design choices

sequential-thinking.description: Step-by-step structured reasoning — use before implementing any algorithm or architecture decision

github.description: GitHub integration — inspect Actions runs, manage Pages deploy, review PRs. Set GITHUB_TOKEN env var first.
